criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "For the Bell Family of six planning a Disney World trip driving from Texarkana/Genoa, the most practical option within the $2,000–$3,000 budget is to drive, stay off-site in a value hotel, and limit park tickets to one day. This approach balances cost, family fit, and convenience, though it restricts the Disney park experience. Other options with more park days or Disney resort stays exceed budget without strong promotions and should be watched for potential deals. Key price sources have been checked with no immediate strong discounts found. The recommended deal to watch is the 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' estimated at $2,850, close to the target budget and labeled a strong deal.",
  "bestMove": {
    "dealId": "drive-offsite-one-park-day",
    "title": "Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day",
    "estimatedTotal": 2850,
    "summary": "Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.",
    "action": "Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.",
    "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
  },
  "watchItems": [
    {
      "dealId": "drive-good-neighbor-two-days",
      "title": "Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days",
      "estimatedTotal": 3750,
      "summary": "Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.",
      "action": "Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "dealId": "drive-disney-value-promo",
      "title": "Drive + Disney value resort promotion",
      "estimatedTotal": 4300,
      "summary": "Best experience, weakest budget fit. This only becomes interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.",
      "action": "Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    }
  ],
  "recommendations": [
    "Focus on off-site value or Good Neighbor hotels with driving to reduce costs.",
    "Prioritize trips with 1 to 2 park days to stay within budget.",
    "Watch for hotel promotions and ticket discounts to improve deal viability.",
    "Verify all prices in real time before booking, especially lodging under $150/night.",
    "Consider free breakfast and shuttle availability as nice-to-haves if budget permits.",
    "Avoid Disney resort packages unless a strong promotion reduces the total below $3,000.",
    "Keep trip length between 3 to 4 days with 2 to 4 nights for optimal scheduling and cost control."
  ],
  "textAlertDraft": "Disney Alert: Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day is estimated at $2,850. Verify prices today before it changes. Visit https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/ to check current deals."
}
```
